name: Frozen Tripe Soup
shortDesc: Beef tripe simmered for hours with egg yolk and garlic cream sauce, then flash-frozen — traditional tripe soup ready in minutes
metaDesc: Çorbacı frozen tripe soup. Long-simmered, flash-frozen, additive-free and preservative-free traditional tripe.
keywords: frozen tripe soup, frozen iskembe, flash-frozen soup, corbaci frozen tripe
longDesc: Beef tripe is carefully cleaned and simmered with garlic, onion and salt, then finished with an egg yolk and lemon cream sauce
Flash-freezing preserves both flavour and nutritional value — no additives or preservatives
Simply heat from frozen; top with sizzling butter, red pepper flakes and garlic for the full traditional taste
High in protein — a satisfying, nourishing and convenient meal ready at any time

otherDesc.name: Storage
otherDesc.value: Can be kept in the freezer for 6 months

otherDesc.name: Shelf Life
otherDesc.value: Once thawed, consume at first heating
